calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

George G. Benetatos, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Zhong Yin Liu, who was placed under oath and examined.
Phillip Wong was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant Robert H. Chang.
Default was entered against defendant on June 24, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 4, 2010.
Wing Chan was not named as a plaintiff in the first amended complaint filed April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Zhong Yin Liu, and against the Defaulted Defendant Robert H. Chang as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $14,322.20.
Attorney's Fees - $25,746.19.
Costs - $445.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $90,513.39.

It is furhter Ordered that the real property located at 159 Bright Street, San Francisco, CA 94132, shall be sold in the manner described prescribed by law, and that a writ of sale be issued to the Sheriff of the City and County of San Francisco, ordered and directing the Sheriff to conduct such sale

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WING CHAN, and, ZHONG LIU'S Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint. Appearances: George Benetatos, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 398-2296, appearing for Plaintiff. There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for leave to file amended complaint is granted. (See Kirkpatrick vs. Westamerica Bank (1998) 65 Cal.App. 4th 982.) Order signed in open Court.(302CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
